claims.summary: Fixed heartbeat intensity may not fit changing pressure or entropy texture.
claims.disposition: Verified current fixed parameters and preserve the mismatch for a bounded capture-first comparison.

claims.summary: Existing continuity and enqueue evidence can localize mechanism without changing it.
claims.disposition: Verified prior-feature continuity metrics, texture context, and enqueue outcomes remain evidence-only.

claims.summary: Pressure- or entropy-responsive intensity would alter autonomous behavior.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait for heartbeat cadence, intensity, admission, rescue, scheduling, or controller changes.
